title: ochna alba
intro: Ochna alba, also known as the white milky way or white lantern tree, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Ochnaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in the management of diabetes. Ochna alba can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
